section_title: A "contingent contract" is a contract to do or not to do something, if some
content:
31. A "contingent contract" is a contract to do or not to do something, if some
contract"
event, collateral to such contract, does or does not happen.
defined
Illustration
A contracts to pay B Taka 10,000 if B's house is burnt. This is a contingent
contract.
Enforcement
illustrations:
A contracts to pay B Taka 10,000 if B's house is burnt. This is a contingent
contract.
